_comment: Design Constitution v2 — 2-state model (NORMAL/PHASE). Used when the analyzer detects the 2-state movement profile (game-nightly branch, Claude's rewrite). COAST is not a state here — it's a momentum tier (is_coasting flag). DIVE is a one-shot impulse event, not a state. Rules adapted accordingly.

rules.name: phase_used_2state
rules.description: PHASE state should appear in at least 5%% of ticks. If lower, phase is underused — either too costly or not useful.

rules.name: no_dominant_state_2state
rules.description: NORMAL should not exceed 90%% of total time (2-state model — NORMAL is the default, so it WILL be dominant; this rule just catches 'never phases at all'). Higher than 90%% means phase is dead.

rules.name: min_chain_length_2state
rules.description: Average chain length should be at least 2.0 states. Lower indicates no phase engagement (just NORMAL walking).

rules.name: pulse_alive_2state
rules.description: Pulse should fire at least 0.3 times per phase activation. Lower indicates pulse is dead — players don't use it in the chain.

rules.name: intentional_cancel_rate_2state
rules.description: At least 30%% of phase exits should be manual cancels (impulse fired). Lower indicates players are letting phase expire naturally rather than engaging with the cancel skill move.

rules.name: expression_floor_2state
rules.description: Expression score should be at least 30/100. Lower indicates the movement system is not being used expressively at all.

rules.name: momentum_not_dead_2state
rules.description: Average momentum should be at least 0.3 (out of 2.0). Lower indicates momentum is not building — players aren't moving fast enough to engage the system.

rules.name: coast_duration_floor_2state
rules.description: Average coast duration should be at least 0.2s. Lower (when coast entries > 0) indicates coast is too fleeting to feel — momentum tier may be too narrow.

rules.name: decision_frequency_floor_2state
rules.description: Decision frequency (phase+pulse per 10s) should be at least 0.5. Lower indicates passive play — player isn't engaging with the verbs.

rules.name: salvage_qte_pass_floor_2state
rules.description: Salvage QTE pass rate should be at least 40%% (when QTEs occurred). Lower indicates QTEs are too hard or controls are unclear. Skip if no QTEs.

rules.name: salvage_qte_pass_ceiling_2state
rules.description: Salvage QTE pass rate should be at most 90%% (when QTEs occurred). Higher indicates QTEs are too easy — no real risk.
